MarathonPage.chooseMarathonDomain: Choose a marathon domain to continue
MarathonPage.noMarathonsDescription: You don't have access to any marathons yet. Contact an administrator to get access.

participantNumber.title: Enter your participant number
participantNumber.description: Enter your 4-digit participant number to continue
participantNumber.descriptionAlreadyExists: We found your participant number. Click continue to proceed.
participantNumber.required: A number with 1 to 4 digits is required.
participantNumber.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

confirmDialog.title: Confirm Participant
confirmDialog.description: We found a session for participant number {ref}. Is this you?
confirmDialog.descriptionExists: We found a session for participant number {ref}. Is this you?
confirmDialog.descriptionNew: This will create a new upload session for this participant number. Continue?

participantDetails.title: Your Details
participantDetails.description: Please confirm your details to continue
participantDetails.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
participantDetails.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
participantDetails.activeTopicAlreadyUploaded: You have already uploaded a photo for the current topic.
participantDetails.resolveError: We could not check your existing by-camera participant. Please try again.
participantDetails.replaceExistingDescription: A submission has already been uploaded for the current topic with this phone number. If you continue, the existing upload for the active topic will be replaced.

classSelection.title: Select Your Class
classSelection.description: Choose the class you want to participate in

deviceSelection.title: Select Your Device
deviceSelection.description: Choose the device you used to take your photos

participantConfirmation.title: Confirm Participant
participantConfirmation.description: To verify your submission, please enter your participant number again.

uploadStep.title: Upload Your Photos
uploadStep.description: Select and upload your photos for submission
uploadStep.readyToSubmit: You have selected all {count} photos. Ready to submit.
uploadStep.clickToSelect: Click or tap to select photos
uploadStep.confirmGoBack: Are you sure you want to go back? This will clear all selected photos.
uploadStep.tooManyFiles: Too many files selected. Only {max} more can be added.
uploadStep.selectAllPhotos: Please select all {count} photos before submitting
uploadStep.selectPhoto: Please select a photo before continuing
uploadStep.selectPhotoPrompt: Tap here to select a photo
uploadStep.failedToGetPresignedUrls: Failed to get upload URLs. Please try again.
uploadStep.confirmUploadDescription: You are about to upload {count} photos for participant {ref}. This action cannot be undone.
uploadStep.confirmUploadDescriptionGeneric: You are about to upload {count} photos. This action cannot be undone.

uploadProgress.clickToRetry: Some files failed. Click retry to try again.
uploadProgress.checkConnection: Please check your connection and try again

VerificationPage.showQrCode: Show this QR code to a crew member to verify your submission.

ConfirmationPage.photosUploaded: Your {count} photos are uploaded and ready for judging! Good work!
ConfirmationPage.votingMessage: You will get an email/SMS when the voting process starts. All participants will vote to determine the winner!

steps.1: We verify all photo series while you sleep well. (Save your photos for a week in case something goes wrong)
steps.2: The photos go to print already at the beginning of next week
steps.3: The jury meets {juryDate}. First {resultsDate} you can share your competition photos outside our group on Facebook
steps.4: Book in {prizeDate} already as the annual prize ceremony is planned!
